name: PlotterNC Studio
tagline: Open-source plotting and CAM software for PlotterNC-powered machines.
shortDescription: A modern, browser-based CAM application for pen plotters and other 2D CNC machines. Import SVG artwork, generate optimized toolpaths, simulate machine motion, and export machine-ready G-code directly from your browser.
longDescription: PlotterNC Studio is an open-source, browser-based CAM (Computer-Aided Manufacturing) application built for pen plotters and other PlotterNC-powered 2D CNC machines. It provides a full SVG-to-G-code workflow: users import vector artwork, the app parses and samples the geometry, optimizes toolpaths using nearest-neighbor path optimization, simulates the resulting machine motion, and exports production-ready G-code. The interface includes object transform tools (move, resize, scale, mirror, fit-to-bed), multiple fill modes (outline-only and exact-as-SVG with adjustable hatch spacing), bed and machine configuration with custom and preset bed sizes, out-of-bounds protection, undo/redo support, and a live toolpath preview with playback controls.
features: Native SVG size detection and restore
Outline-only and exact-as-SVG fill modes with adjustable hatch spacing and sample quality
Object transform tools (move, resize, scale X/Y, mirror, center/fit to bed)
Bed presets (200x200, 300x300, 500x500) and custom bed sizes
Out-of-bounds detection with warning banner and invalid slice protection
Toolpath scrubbing and playback controls (play, pause, rewind, jump to end)
Draw path, travel path, and pen event visualization
Modern dark theme UI with file, machine, G-code, and layers panels
futureFeatures: A4 / A3 / A5 and additional standard paper presets
Estimated plot time and draw/travel distance statistics
Direct PlotterNC upload and WiFi connection
PDF, DXF, PNG, and JPG import
Layer operations and object tree improvements
Path editing tools and node editing
Live PlotterNC monitoring and real-time job control

seo.title: PlotterNC Studio - Open-Source CAM Software for Pen Plotters
seo.description: PlotterNC Studio is an open-source, browser-based CAM application for pen plotters and PlotterNC-powered machines. Import SVG, generate optimized toolpaths, simulate, and export G-code.
